title: Department of Financial Affairs - About
content:
Department of Financial Affairs - About

Üsküdar University Financial Affairs Department carries out all accounting, finance, budgeting, financial reporting activities in accordance with the Higher Education Law and other relevant financial legislation, as well as the control and follow-up of student current accounts and student scholarship payments.

maliisler@uskudar.edu.tr
